## Description

Brief description of the documentation change.

## Type

- [ ] New page
- [ ] Content update
- [ ] Bug fix (broken link, typo)
- [ ] Structure change

## Checklist

- [ ] Frontmatter includes `title` and `description`
- [ ] Page added to `mint.json` navigation (if new)
- [ ] Code examples are tested and correct
- [ ] Links are valid
- [ ] No hardcoded API keys in examples
